description_long: This object is a compact, ornately detailed firearm with a metallic frame and a dark, polished wooden grip. The barrel and cylinder are finished in a brass or gold tone, contrasting with the blackened steel of the main body. The grip features decorative inlays and a curved ergonomic shape, while the trigger and hammer are visibly metallic and functional. The cylinder is prominent, suggesting a revolver mechanism, and the barrel is relatively short and robust. The overall design is reminiscent of a classic revolver, with intricate engravings and a sturdy build. The object appears well-crafted, with a mix of matte and glossy finishes highlighting its contours.
description: A compact, ornately detailed revolver-style firearm with a brass-toned barrel and dark wooden grip, featuring intricate engravings and a robust build.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular barrel opening and the top of the grip, with visible engravings on the upper frame.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full profile, including the curved wooden grip, metallic cylinder, and detailed engravings along the barrel and frame.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back of the grip and the alignment of the barrel, with the cylinder's width visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other profile, with similar details as view 1 but from the left side, including the hammer and trigger.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, short and robust with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no finger grooves
